articles.title: Algorand blockchain open API connector goes live on the SAP API Business Hub
articles.description: CryptoNinjas » Algorand blockchain open API connector goes live on the SAP API Business Hub Algorand, the proof-of-stake blockchain platform, today announced that its open connector API is now live on the SAP Business Hub, providing much-needed interoperability between SAP enterprise applications on the SAP Cloud Platform (SCP) or standalone SAP Clients and the Algorand protocol. This...

articles.title: Augur Launches ‘Augur Turbo’ on Polygon to Expand Sports Betting Program
articles.description: Decentralized prediction market platform Augur has launched a new sportsbook, Augur Turbo, that will live on the Polygon Layer 2 network.

articles.title: Ethereum DeFi Coins, Polygon Lead Crypto Market Recovery
articles.description: The majority of cryptocurrencies are back in the green zone after last week’s “bloodbath”—and some of them nearly doubled in price already.

articles.title: Investing in Ethereum should be correlated with positions in BNB, LINK, LTC; Why?
articles.description: Crypto-market corrections can be nasty and Ethereum suffered one of its worst drawdowns over the past couple of weeks. While the market decline was collective, the sentiment noted by Bitcoin and Ethereum was poles apart. The community’s beloved Bitcoin was identified as an opportunity, while ETH’s social sentiment touched a new low. According to Santiment, […]

articles.title: Polkadot (DOT) Bounces and Attempts to Initiate a Bullish Reversal
articles.description: Polkadot (DOT) has been moving downwards since May 15, when it reached an all-time high of $49.78. While it has temporarily halted the decrease with a significant bounce, the bullish reversal is not confirmed yet.

articles.title: I Would Not Consider DOGE the Tech of the Future of Digital Finance: Cardano CTO
articles.description: IOHK's Romain Pellerin believes Dogecoin is hardly anything more than a meme, and it is certainly not the tech of the future for digital currencies

articles.title: After Bitcoin and Dogecoin: Rapper Meek Mill Plans to Buy Shiba Inu (SHIB)
articles.description: After buying BTC and DOGE, the rapper Meek Mill plans to allocate funds in the so-called Dogecoin-killer - Shiba Inu.

articles.title: Ripple Price Analysis: XRP Sees 8% Daily Bounce but is $1 in Sight?
articles.description: XRP bounced by 8% today to break back above the 2020 highs and reach $0.85. Against bitcoin, XRP found solid support at a .786 Fib and has bounced to 2330 SAT.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Discusses Elon Musk’s Problematic Dogecoin Scalability Claims
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin published a post on the various scalability solutions for blockchains and how increasing parameters, as suggested by Musk, are inadvisable.

articles.title: Crypto Markets Rebound $300 Billion: Bitcoin Above $36K Again (Market Watch)
articles.description: After reaching a near 3-month low of $1.230 trillion, the crypto market cap has recovered $300 billion as bitcoin stands above $36,000.

articles.title: Is Ripple Behind Most of the Bitcoin Energy Usage FUD? CoinShares’ Meltem Demirors Thinks So
articles.description: The Bitcoin market hasn’t been a pretty sight of late. The top cryptocurrency seems to be struggling to beat back the bears as price take a hit after another. articles.title: US Rapper Meek Mill Attracted by Shiba-Inu Coins after Grabbing DOGE and Bitcoin
articles.description: Popular US rapper Meek Mill seems to be into Shiba-Inu coins as he continues his foray into cryptocurrencies, DOGE and Bitcoin already on his balance

articles.title: TA: Ethereum Faces Hurdles, Here’s What Could Trigger Strong Recovery
articles.description: Ethereum extended its decline and traded close to the $1,700 zone against the US Dollar. ETH price is recovering, but it is facing a strong resistance near $2,200. articles.title: "6-8 weeks ago there were 10-15 signups a day. There are 15,000-20,000 signups a day. So they are playing baseball.…
Bitcoin price plunges and altcoins sell-off as crypto market decline intensifies
articles.description: Bitcoin price and altcoins take a series of heavy hits as the weekend sell-off deepens. Reports of major Asian exchanges putting restrictions on Chinese customers, a blatant DeFi exit scam, and increasing regulator scrutiny in Hong Kong are destabilizing the crypto markets.
